allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('framer-motion'\); console.log\('motion:', typeof m.motion, 'AnimatePresence:', typeof m.AnimatePresence, 'useScroll:', typeof m.useScroll\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@hugeicons/core-free-icons'\); const keys = Object.keys\(icons\); console.log\('Total:', keys.length\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sign'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('car'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('window'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('tool'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('wrench'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('build'\)\).slice\(0,20\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const h = require\('@hugeicons/react'\); const ic = require\('@hugeicons/core-free-icons'\); console.log\('hugeicons/react keys:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(h\)\)\); console.log\('core-free keys sample:', Object.keys\(ic\).slice\(0,5\)\)")
